title: Internal error on case statement with identical cases.
body:
---


Author Name: **Wilson Snyder** (@wsnyder)
Original Redmine Issue: 99 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2009-06-22
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

```
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_case_dupitems.v:75: ../V3Ast.cpp:495: New node already linked?

```

```
       case (in[1:0])
         2'd0, 2'd1, 2'd2, 2'd3: begin
            out <= in;
         end
       endcase

```
